columns.description: The unique key of the orders mart.
columns.name: order_id

columns.description: The foreign key relating to the customer who placed the order.
columns.name: customer_id

columns.description: The foreign key relating to the location where the order was placed.
columns.name: location_id

columns.description: The total amount of the order in USD including tax.
columns.name: order_total

columns.description: The timestamp the order was placed at.
columns.name: ordered_at

columns.description: The pre-tax subtotal of the order in cents.
columns.name: subtotal_cents

columns.description: The tax portion of the order in cents.
columns.name: tax_paid_cents

columns.description: The total amount of the order in cents including tax.
columns.name: order_total_cents

columns.description: The pre-tax subtotal of the order in USD.
columns.name: subtotal

columns.description: The tax portion of the order in USD.
columns.name: tax_paid

columns.description: The sum of supply expenses to fulfill the order.
columns.name: order_cost

columns.description: The sum of product prices for all items in the order.
columns.name: order_items_subtotal

columns.description: The number of items in the order.
columns.name: count_order_items

columns.description: The number of food items in the order.
columns.name: count_food_items

columns.description: The number of drink items in the order.
columns.name: count_drink_items

columns.description: A boolean indicating if this order included any food items.
columns.name: is_food_order

columns.description: A boolean indicating if this order included any drink items.
columns.name: is_drink_order

columns.description: The sequential order number for this customer (1 = first order).
columns.name: customer_order_number

compiled_code:
with

orders as (

    select * from shaman.jf_staging.stg_orders

),

order_items as (

    select * from shaman.jf_analytics.order_items

),

order_items_summary as (

    select
        order_id,

        sum(supply_cost) as order_cost,
        sum(product_price) as order_items_subtotal,
        count(order_item_id) as count_order_items,
        sum(
            case
                when is_food_item then 1
                else 0
            end
        ) as count_food_items,
        sum(
            case
                when is_drink_item then 1
                else 0
            end
        ) as count_drink_items

    from order_items

    group by 1

),

compute_booleans as (

    select
        orders.*,

        order_items_summary.order_cost,
        order_items_summary.order_items_subtotal,
        order_items_summary.count_food_items,
        order_items_summary.count_drink_items,
        order_items_summary.count_order_items,
        order_items_summary.count_food_items > 0 as is_food_order,
        order_items_summary.count_drink_items > 0 as is_drink_order

    from orders

    left join
        order_items_summary
        on orders.order_id = order_items_summary.order_id

),

customer_order_count as (

    select
        *,

        row_number() over (
            partition by customer_id
            order by ordered_at asc
        ) as customer_order_number

    from compute_booleans

)

select * from customer_order_count
description: Order overview data mart, offering key details for each order inlcluding if it's a customer's first order and a food vs. drink item breakdown. One row per order.
label: orders
name: orders
raw_code:
with

orders as (

    select * from {{ ref('stg_orders') }}

),

order_items as (

    select * from {{ ref('order_items') }}

),

order_items_summary as (

    select
        order_id,

        sum(supply_cost) as order_cost,
        sum(product_price) as order_items_subtotal,
        count(order_item_id) as count_order_items,
        sum(
            case
                when is_food_item then 1
                else 0
            end
        ) as count_food_items,
        sum(
            case
                when is_drink_item then 1
                else 0
            end
        ) as count_drink_items

    from order_items

    group by 1

),

compute_booleans as (

    select
        orders.*,

        order_items_summary.order_cost,
        order_items_summary.order_items_subtotal,
        order_items_summary.count_food_items,
        order_items_summary.count_drink_items,
        order_items_summary.count_order_items,
        order_items_summary.count_food_items > 0 as is_food_order,
        order_items_summary.count_drink_items > 0 as is_drink_order

    from orders

    left join
        order_items_summary
        on orders.order_id = order_items_summary.order_id

),

customer_order_count as (

    select
        *,

        row_number() over (
            partition by customer_id
            order by ordered_at asc
        ) as customer_order_number

    from compute_booleans

)

select * from customer_order_count
